title: Sequencing-free whole genome spatial transcriptomics at molecular resolution in intact tissue.
author: Cheng Y Dang S Zhang Y Chen Y Yu R Liu M Jin S Han A Katz S Wang S
content: S-EPMC11952344 PMC11952344 Sequencing-free whole genome spatial transcriptomics at molecular resolution in intact tissue. Recent breakthroughs in spatial transcriptomics technologies have enhanced our understanding of diverse cellular identities, compositions, interactions, spatial organizations
